tasks.title: Phase 0: Project Infrastructure Setup
tasks.description: Initialize monorepo with yarn workspaces, TypeScript, testing and CI/CD
tasks.details: Set up complete development infrastructure including yarn workspaces configuration, TypeScript setup across all packages, Jest testing framework, ESLint and Prettier for code quality, Husky pre-commit hooks, and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
tasks.testStrategy: Verify yarn test works in all packages, CI triggers on push, linting passes, folder structure matches specification

tasks.title: Phase 1: Domain Layer - Value Objects
tasks.description: Implement all value objects with TDD approach
tasks.details: Create RecordId, TagId, RecordContent, SearchQuery value objects with full validation, factories, and comprehensive tests. Must achieve >95% test coverage
tasks.testStrategy: TDD with tests written first, all value objects immutable, validation rules enforced, factories work correctly

tasks.title: Phase 1: Domain Layer - Entities
tasks.description: Implement Record and Tag entities with invariants
tasks.details: Create Tag entity with normalized value, Record entity with content and tags, implement factories with restore capability, validate all invariants
tasks.testStrategy: TDD approach, entities immutable, invariants enforced, equals methods work correctly

tasks.title: Phase 1: Domain Layer - Services
tasks.description: Implement domain services for tag processing
tasks.details: Create TagNormalizer with diacritics handling, TagValidator with rules, TagParser for content parsing, RecordMatcher for search, RecordDuplicateChecker
tasks.testStrategy: TDD with comprehensive test cases, handle Unicode correctly, normalization configurable

tasks.title: Phase 1: Domain Layer - Error Handling
tasks.description: Create domain errors hierarchy and Result type
tasks.details: Implement DomainError base class, specific error types (InvalidRecordContent, InvalidTag, DuplicateRecord, TagLimitExceeded), Result type utilities
tasks.testStrategy: All error cases covered, Result type handles success/failure, error messages informative

tasks.title: Phase 2: Application Layer - Ports
tasks.details: Create RecordRepository and TagRepository interfaces, define UnitOfWork pattern for transactions, establish port boundaries
tasks.testStrategy: Interfaces follow dependency inversion, no implementation details leak, support all needed operations

tasks.title: Phase 2: CreateRecord Use Case
tasks.description: Implement record creation with validation and duplicate check
tasks.details: Parse content into tags, validate each token, normalize tags, find or create tag entities, check for duplicates, save record with transaction
tasks.testStrategy: TDD with mock repositories, handle all validation cases, prevent duplicates, transaction rollback on error

tasks.title: Phase 2: SearchRecords Use Case
tasks.description: Implement search with automatic mode detection
tasks.details: Parse and normalize query, find matching records with AND logic, detect display mode (list/cloud), build appropriate result DTO
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various query combinations, mode detection works correctly, performance acceptable

tasks.title: Phase 2: UpdateRecord Use Case
tasks.description: Implement record update with tag cleanup
tasks.details: Find existing record, parse new content, update tags, check for duplicates excluding current record, cleanup unused tags after update
tasks.testStrategy: TDD approach, handle tag changes correctly, prevent creating duplicates, cleanup works

tasks.title: Phase 2: DeleteRecord Use Case
tasks.description: Implement record deletion with tag cleanup
tasks.details: Delete record by ID, identify and remove unused tags, maintain referential integrity
tasks.testStrategy: Record deleted successfully, unused tags removed, tags used by other records preserved

tasks.title: Phase 2: GetTagSuggestions Use Case
tasks.details: Find tags by prefix after normalization, limit results, sort by usage frequency
tasks.testStrategy: Suggestions match partial input, respect limit, sorted correctly

tasks.title: Phase 2: ImportData Use Case
tasks.description: Implement full data import with replacement
tasks.details: Validate JSON format, delete all existing data, parse and import records, generate new IDs for all entities, create backup before import
tasks.testStrategy: Test validation, full replacement works, handles errors gracefully, backup created

tasks.title: Phase 2: ExportData Use Case
tasks.description: Implement data export without internal IDs
tasks.details: Export all records with content and dates only, exclude UUID identifiers, add metadata with version and normalization rules
tasks.testStrategy: Export format valid JSON, no UUIDs included, metadata complete

tasks.title: Phase 2: Application Services
tasks.details: Implement SearchModeDetector for UI mode selection, TagCloudBuilder for tag frequency analysis, ImportValidator, ExportFormatter
tasks.testStrategy: Mode detection accurate, tag cloud calculates sizes correctly, validators work

tasks.title: Phase 2: Application Container
tasks.details: Create ApplicationContainer with all use cases and services, implement ApplicationContainerFactory, configure DI
tasks.testStrategy: Container initializes correctly, dependencies resolved, no circular dependencies

tasks.title: Phase 3: Storage Manager
tasks.details: Create StorageSchema definition, implement StorageManager with serialization, handle quota limits
tasks.testStrategy: Serialization/deserialization works, handles storage quota, version migrations

tasks.title: Phase 3: Index Manager
tasks.details: Implement IndexManager for tag-to-records and normalized-to-tag mappings, maintain indexes on changes
tasks.testStrategy: Indexes updated correctly, O(1) lookups work, rebuild from scratch works

tasks.title: Phase 3: LocalStorageRecordRepository
tasks.details: Create CRUD operations for records, implement search by tags with AND logic, support deleteAll for import
tasks.testStrategy: All CRUD operations work, search performs well, indexes maintained

tasks.title: Phase 3: LocalStorageTagRepository
tasks.details: Create CRUD for tags, implement prefix search for autocomplete, usage tracking, cleanup unused tags
tasks.testStrategy: Tag operations work, autocomplete fast, usage count accurate

tasks.title: Phase 3: LocalStorageUnitOfWork
tasks.details: Create transaction semantics for localStorage, implement commit/rollback, ensure consistency
tasks.testStrategy: Transactions atomic, rollback works on error, no partial updates

tasks.title: Phase 3: Migration Manager
tasks.details: Implement version detection, create migration scripts, handle backward compatibility
tasks.testStrategy: Old versions migrate correctly, data preserved, version tracking works

tasks.title: Phase 4: React Application Setup
tasks.details: Configure Vite bundler, set up React with TypeScript, create base component structure, configure CSS modules
tasks.testStrategy: App builds and runs, HMR works, TypeScript configured

tasks.title: Phase 4: Application Context
tasks.description: Set up React contexts and providers
tasks.details: Create ApplicationContext for DI container, ConfigContext for settings, UIStateContext for UI state
tasks.testStrategy: Contexts provide values correctly, no unnecessary re-renders

tasks.title: Phase 4: SearchInput Component
tasks.description: Create main input field with debounce
tasks.details: Implement universal input for search and create, add debounce logic, handle Enter key for creation
tasks.testStrategy: Debounce works, keyboard handling correct, state management works

tasks.title: Phase 4: RecordList Component
tasks.details: Create RecordList and RecordItem components, add edit/delete actions, implement selection
tasks.testStrategy: Records display correctly, actions work, keyboard navigation works

tasks.title: Phase 4: TagCloud Component
tasks.details: Implement tag cloud with size calculation, click handling for search, smooth animations
tasks.testStrategy: Sizes calculated correctly, clicks update search, responsive layout

tasks.title: Phase 4: AutoComplete Component
tasks.details: Create dropdown with suggestions, keyboard navigation, click to select, integrate with SearchInput
tasks.testStrategy: Suggestions appear on type, keyboard nav works, selection updates input

tasks.title: Phase 4: Import/Export UI
tasks.description: Create file upload and download interface
tasks.details: Implement ImportExport components, file upload handling, progress indicators, error states
tasks.testStrategy: File upload works, download triggers, errors handled gracefully

tasks.title: Phase 4: Keyboard Shortcuts
tasks.details: Add keyboard shortcuts hook, implement navigation (arrows, Enter, Escape, Tab), focus management
tasks.testStrategy: All shortcuts work, focus trapped correctly, accessibility maintained

tasks.title: Phase 4: Responsive Design
tasks.description: Make UI adaptive for all screen sizes
tasks.details: Implement responsive layouts, mobile-first approach, test on various devices
tasks.testStrategy: Works on 320px width, tablet and desktop layouts optimal

tasks.title: Phase 4: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize bundle size and runtime performance
tasks.details: Implement code splitting, lazy loading, tree shaking, optimize re-renders
tasks.testStrategy: Bundle < 500KB gzipped, FCP < 1.5s, TTI < 3s, 60 FPS

tasks.title: Phase 4: Accessibility
tasks.details: Add ARIA labels, ensure keyboard navigation, screen reader support, color contrast
tasks.testStrategy: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, screen reader testing, keyboard-only navigation

tasks.title: Phase 5: CLI Setup with Ink
tasks.description: Initialize CLI application with Ink framework
tasks.details: Set up Ink for terminal UI, create base component structure, integrate with application layer
tasks.testStrategy: CLI runs, renders correctly, connects to application layer

tasks.title: Phase 5: CLI Commands
tasks.description: Implement add, search, update, delete commands
tasks.details: Create command handlers, argument parsing, output formatting, error handling
tasks.testStrategy: All commands work, arguments parsed correctly, errors handled

tasks.title: Phase 5: Shell Integration
tasks.details: Create shell completion scripts, add aliases (tm, misc), man pages, installation script
tasks.testStrategy: Autocomplete works in bash/zsh, aliases configured, man pages readable

tasks.title: Testing: Domain Layer Tests
tasks.details: Write comprehensive tests for all value objects, entities, services, ensure immutability, test invariants
tasks.testStrategy: Coverage > 95%, all edge cases covered, tests run < 1s

tasks.title: Testing: Application Layer Tests
tasks.description: Achieve >90% test coverage for use cases
tasks.details: Test all use cases with mocks, test error handling, validate business rules
tasks.testStrategy: Coverage > 90%, mock repositories used, all paths tested

tasks.title: Testing: Integration Tests
tasks.details: Test repository implementations, storage persistence, data integrity, migration scenarios
tasks.testStrategy: All integrations work, data persists correctly, migrations tested

tasks.title: Testing: E2E Tests
tasks.details: Test first time user flow, daily usage scenarios, import/export cycle, performance under load
tasks.testStrategy: All user journeys work, performance acceptable, no data loss

tasks.title: Documentation: API Documentation
tasks.details: Create API documentation for domain, application, and infrastructure layers, include examples
tasks.testStrategy: All public APIs documented, examples work, generated docs readable

tasks.title: Documentation: User Guide
tasks.details: Write getting started guide, feature documentation, troubleshooting, FAQ
tasks.testStrategy: Documentation complete, examples clear, covers all features

tasks.title: CI/CD: Production Build Pipeline
tasks.description: Set up automated builds and deployments
tasks.details: Configure production builds, minification, source maps, deployment to hosting
tasks.testStrategy: Builds succeed, artifacts generated, deployment works

tasks.title: Release: Version 1.0 Preparation
tasks.details: Final testing, performance audit, security review, changelog, release notes
tasks.testStrategy: All tests pass, performance targets met, no critical bugs

tasks.title: Release: Deploy MVP
tasks.details: Deploy web application, publish NPM packages, announce release, gather feedback
tasks.testStrategy: Application accessible, packages published, monitoring active

tasks.title: Post-Release: Monitor and Iterate
tasks.details: Monitor error rates, gather user feedback, prioritize fixes, plan next iteration
tasks.testStrategy: Monitoring working, feedback collected, hotfixes deployed
